# Password Reset

To reset your password for your Acme Shop account, go to the homepage and click on "Sign In." Select the "Forgot Password?" link, enter your registered email address, and check your email for a password reset link, which should arrive within a few minutes. The link will guide you to a secure page for setting a new password, which must meet security criteria of at least eight characters and a combination of letters, numbers, and special characters. Remember, the link expires after 24 hours, and customer support is available 24/7 for any issues.

[Source: account_management.md#password-reset]
